title: Crypto advocacy groups support CLARITY passage as ethics rules face pushback
summary: The window for US lawmakers to address a comprehensive crypto market structure bill before the 2026 elections is closing, and industry organizations are calling for action.

title: Internet Freedom Foundation calls India’s BitChat GitHub takedown order ‘unconstitutional’
summary: The digital rights group says India’s order to remove Jack Dorsey’s BitChat repositories from GitHub exceeds the government’s legal authority and threatens free speech.

title: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls on Hopes for US-Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks and bonds higher, with oil falling on hopes that mediated talks between the US and Iran will resume after a collapse in their fragile ceasefire deal.

title: PE Founder, Ex-GOP Candidate Pleads Guilty to $50 Million Fraud
summary: A private equity firm founder and onetime Republican candidate for governor of New Hampshire pleaded guilty to defrauding investors out of more than $50 million.

title: Clarity Act on the Ropes as Ethics Fight and Shrinking Calendar Threaten Passage
summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune signals the crypto market-structure bill likely won't clear the chamber before the August recess, as Democrats reject the GOP's ethics language and analysts slash the odds of passage.

title: Poolin, Once One of Bitcoin's Biggest Mining Pools, Files for Bankruptcy
summary: The Singapore-based pool never recovered from freezing withdrawals in 2022. Now it's auctioning off its last Texas mining sites to pay back 11,700 users still holding IOUs.

title: Wise plans to resubmit national trust bank application under GENIUS Act framework
summary: The OCC has granted conditional approval to several stablecoin-focused entities since December.

title: Galaxy cuts Clarity Act passage odds to 30%, says bill needs ‘last-ditch effort’
summary: Seven Democratic negotiators say the latest Clarity Act draft needs stronger ethics and consumer protections.

title: Europe wins and Brazil loses in Trump tariff overhaul
summary: Some countries are relatively better off but the reprieve may only be temporary

title: Trump threatens new EU tariffs in retaliation for fines on US tech groups
summary: President says Washington will launch new probe into the bloc that could sharpen trade tensions
